name: 90-minute Soft Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 12
Mix together 1 cup flour, sugar, salt, and undissolved yeast. Heat 1 cup water and margarine to a temperature between 120°F and 130°F. Gradually add the mixture to the dry ingredients; beat for 2 minutes at medium speed of the mixer. Add an additional 1/2 cup flour.
Beat at high speed for another 2 minutes. Stir in enough additional flour to form a soft dough. Place the dough on a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes. Transfer the dough to a greased bowl; turn so that the top is also greased. Cover and let rise in a warm, draft-free place for 40 minutes.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a 20-inch rope. Shape the ropes into pretzels or other desired shapes. Place them on greased baking sheets. Cover; let rest for 5 minutes. Beat together the egg yolk and 1 tablespoon water in a small bowl. Brush the pretzels with this mixture and sprinkle with coarse salt. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool on wire racks.
